title: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin
prompt: Implement `convert(value, from_unit, to_unit)` in solution_stub.py. Units are the strings 'C', 'F', and 'K'. Convert `value` from `from_unit` to `to_unit` and return the result rounded to 2 decimal places. Converting to the same unit returns the value unchanged (rounded to 2 dp).
